context: We got some new neighbors recently, and this week I went around and said hi to the family from the country with a long history of ancient ruins and the family from the country famous for its cuisine. But then later that night I saw the father from the family with darker skin, who had seemed so nice before, slap his wife during an argument. At least I still know the father from the family with a tradition of fine wine and cheese is a good guy, he was cooking dinner for his wife and children when I stopped by later.
